messages.content:
摘要上文：% Recent advances in LLM have shown significant potential in autonomous AI research.
Recent breakthroughs in artificial intelligence are catalyzing a paradigm shift in AI research itself. Powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) with advanced reasoning and coding capabilities, AI research agents have shown great promise across a spectrum of scientific tasks—from synthesizing literature and formulating research hypotheses to generating experiment code.
% Challenges
However, independently executing comprehensive research tasks aligned with real-world needs, such as LLM training and adaptation, remains a significant challenge for current approaches.
% Our AI Researcher Systems: modules and features
In this paper, we introduce~\tbd{METHOD NAME}, a multi-agent system designed to automate the entire LLM training lifecycle. By orchestrating the collaboration between two core modules—the Experimenter and the Executor—the system seamlessly performs requirement analysis, open-domain literature and data research, training strategy formulation, data recipe preparation, and model training and evaluation. The multi-round experimental process is modeled as a search tree, enabling the system to efficiently plan exploration paths, reuse historical results, and distill high-level insights from iterative trials.
  
生成摘要的下一句，内容为：“为了进行评估AI 系统训练优化模型的水平，我们构建了一个新的 benchmark，由 10 个来自真实学术论文或竞赛的 LLM 训练任务构成。” 不需要严格按照中文语序，用 native 的方式表达

Here are a few options, ranging from standard academic style to a more flowery narrative style.

**Option 1 (Most standard and professional):**
> "To evaluate the system's proficiency in optimizing model training, we introduce a novel benchmark comprising 10 diverse LLM training tasks derived from real-world academic papers and competitions."

**Option 2 (Focusing on validation):**
> "To validate our system's capability in model optimization, we construct a comprehensive benchmark consisting of 10 realistic LLM training scenarios collected from academic literature and technical competitions."

**Option 3 (Slightly more concise):**
> "To assess the system's performance, we present a new benchmark featuring 10 LLM training tasks sourced directly from actual academic research and competitions."

**Recommendation:**
**Option 1** fits best with the flow of your existing abstract. It naturally transitions from the system description to the evaluation methodology.
